t.t-if: has_subscription and active_subscription and (not moyee_config or moyee_config.get('show_subscription', True))

div.span: Your next delivery will be sent on , expect the coffee within 2 days.
Your subscription is currently paused. Resume anytime to receive your next delivery.

t.t-value: ('is_delivery' in line._fields and line.is_delivery) or 'delivery' in lname_check
line.price_total < 0 or line.price_subtotal < 0 or 'discount' in lname_check or 'promo' in lname_check or 'coupon' in lname_check

div.style: font-size: 20px; background: transparent; border: none; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
font-size: 20px; background: transparent; border: none; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;

span.style: font-size: 10px; font-weight: 600; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.3px; border: 1px solid var(--moyee-gray-2); padding: 2px 6px;

a.title: Edit
a.style: border: 1px solid var(--moyee-gray-2); border-radius: 6px; width: 32px; height: 32px; display: inline-flex; justify-content: center; align-items: center; text-decoration: none; font-size: 13px; background: #fff;

button.title: Remove
button.style: border: 1px solid var(--moyee-gray-2); border-radius: 6px; width: 32px; height: 32px; display: inline-flex; justify-content: center; align-items: center; background: #fff; padding: 0; font-size: 13px;
button.onclick: return confirm('Remove this product from your subscription?');

t.t-value: sub_active_lines.filtered(lambda l: ('is_delivery' in l._fields and l.is_delivery) or 'delivery' in (l.product_id and l.product_id.name or l.name or '').lower())

sub_active_lines.filtered(lambda l: not l.display_type and (l.price_total < 0 or l.price_subtotal < 0 or 'discount' in (l.product_id and l.product_id.name or l.name or '').lower() or 'promo' in (l.product_id and l.product_id.name or l.name or '').lower() or 'coupon' in (l.product_id and l.product_id.name or l.name or '').lower()))

sub_active_lines.filtered(lambda l: not l.display_type and not ('is_delivery' in l._fields and l.is_delivery) and 'delivery' not in (l.product_id and l.product_id.name or l.name or '').lower() and l not in sub_discount_lines)

a.title: Change frequency
a.style: border: 1px solid var(--moyee-gray-2); border-radius: 6px; width: 32px; height: 32px; display: inline-flex; justify-content: center; align-items: center; text-decoration: none; font-size: 13px; background: #fff;

div.div: View your order history or reorder
Submit a question or view your messages

· items
· Delivery:
Not available yet
· T&T:
Track shipment ()
Not available yet

div.class: js-orders-pagination d-none justify-content-center align-items-center gap-2 mt-3

button.class: btn btn-sm btn-link text-muted ms-2 js-orders-show-less

t.div: You don't have any orders yet. Start shopping →

div.class: js-invoices-pagination d-none justify-content-center align-items-center gap-2 mt-3

button.class: btn btn-sm btn-link text-muted ms-2 js-invoices-show-less

div.div: How can I repeat a previous order? +
Go to "My orders" above and click on a previous order. From the order details page you can reorder the same products with just one click.
What are the benefits of a subscription? +
With a subscription you'll never run out of coffee. Automatically delivered, flexibly adjustable and at a fair price for the farmer and you.
How do I change my delivery address? +
Click on "Edit" next to your personal details, or navigate to your subscription management page to update the delivery address specifically for your subscription.
What is the difference between the Moyee coffee types? +

Single (light, fruity), Double (full, balanced), Triple (complex, powerful), Dark Roast (strong, ideal for espresso) and Microlot (limited, monthly rotation). All FairChain — roasted in the country of origin.

div.style: background: #1C1C1E; border-radius: 12px; padding: 28px 24px; color: #FFFFFF; font-family: inherit;
color: #FFC107; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 800; letter-spacing: 1px; text-transform: uppercase; margin-bottom: 6px;

h3.style: font-size: 26px; font-weight: 900; text-transform: uppercase; margin: 0 0 10px; line-height: 1.15; color: #FFFFFF;

div.p: Great beans deserve great brewing. Step-by-step cheat sheets — grind, ratio, time — for every setup in your kitchen.

div.style: display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(220px, 1fr)); gap: 12px; margin-bottom: 24px;

a.style: display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; background: #2C2C2E; border: 1.5px solid transparent; border-radius: 8px; padding: 14px 16px; text-decoration: none !important; color: #FFFFFF !important; transition: all 0.2s ease;

div.style: font-size: 14px; font-weight: 800; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.3px; color: #FFFFFF;

a.style: display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; background: #2C2C2E; border: 1.5px solid transparent; border-radius: 8px; padding: 14px 16px; text-decoration: none !important; color: #FFFFFF !important; transition: all 0.2s ease;

div.style: font-size: 14px; font-weight: 800; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.3px; color: #FFFFFF;

a.style: display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; background: #2C2C2E; border: 1.5px solid transparent; border-radius: 8px; padding: 14px 16px; text-decoration: none !important; color: #FFFFFF !important; transition: all 0.2s ease;

div.style: font-size: 14px; font-weight: 800; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.3px; color: #FFFFFF;

a.style: display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; background: #2C2C2E; border: 1.5px solid transparent; border-radius: 8px; padding: 14px 16px; text-decoration: none !important; color: #FFFFFF !important; transition: all 0.2s ease;

div.style: font-size: 14px; font-weight: 800; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.3px; color: #FFFFFF;

a.style: display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; background: #2C2C2E; border: 1.5px solid transparent; border-radius: 8px; padding: 14px 16px; text-decoration: none !important; color: #FFFFFF !important; transition: all 0.2s ease;

div.style: font-size: 14px; font-weight: 800; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.3px; color: #FFFFFF;
display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; border-top: 1px solid #2C2C2E; padding-top: 20px; font-size: 12px; color: #A0A0A5; font-weight: 600;

a.style: background: #FFC107; color: #1C1C1E !important; border: none; border-radius: 6px; padding: 8px 16px; font-weight: 800; font-size: 12px; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.5px; transition: opacity 0.15s;

template.name: Moyee My Account - Inspire & Tell a Friend

div.t-if: (not moyee_config or moyee_config.get('show_inspire', True)) or (not moyee_config or moyee_config.get('show_taf', True))

t.t-esc: moyee_config.get('inspire_eyebrow', 'Do you know where your coffee comes from?')
moyee_config.get('inspire_body', 'Your Moyee coffee comes from small farmers in the Kaffa forest in Ethiopia. They receive a fair price — thanks to you.')

div.div: Share the love for fair coffee. Send a friend an invitation and give them 10% off their first order.

t.t-if: not has_subscription and (not moyee_config or moyee_config.get('show_sidebar_upsell', True))

div.div: Never an empty kitchen cabinet and 10,000 karma points. Welcome to the revolution!
Specialty Coffee automatically delivered to your door. Never run out again!
Adjust your products, how often we deliver, or pause your subscription in a heartbeat.
Consistent orders mean consistent and good prices for our farmers and roasters.

t.div: This system does not expose a configured next date field for subscriptions.

t.p: Your next delivery will be sent on , expect the coffee within 2 days. Choose a new delivery date or skip a delivery.

label.style: font-size: 11px; font-weight: 800; color: #555; letter-spacing: 0.5px; margin-bottom: 8px; display: block; text-transform: uppercase;

input.name: next_date
input.style: border-radius: 12px; border: 1.5px solid #E2E8F0; padding: 12px 16px; font-size: 15px; font-weight: 700; height: 50px; color: #111;

div.style: font-size: 12px; font-weight: 800; color: #444; margin: 16px 0 12px; letter-spacing: 0.5px; text-transform: uppercase;

button.style: background: white; border: 1.5px solid #E2E8F0; border-radius: 12px; font-weight: 700; padding: 14px 20px; color: #111; font-size: 15px; text-align: center; display: block; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,0.05); transition: all 0.2s;
flex: 1; background: #F5F6F8; border: none; border-radius: 12px; font-weight: 700; height: 48px; color: #444; font-size: 15px; padding: 0;
flex: 2.5; background: var(--moyee-pink); border: none; border-radius: 12px; font-weight: 700; height: 48px; color: white; font-size: 15px; padding: 0;

t.div: No intervals are available for this subscription.

form.p: How often do you want to receive your coffee?

t.t-if: 'every month' in pname or '1 month' in pname or pname == 'monthly'

t.t-elif: '2 months' in pname or 'two months' in pname
'3 months' in pname or 'three months' in pname

label.style: width: 100%; display: block; margin-bottom: 12px; cursor: pointer;

input.name: plan_id
input.t-att-checked: 'checked' if current_plan_id and current_plan_id == pl.id else None

t.t-if: deliveries_text and deliveries_text not in ('Deliveries on custom schedule', 'Deliveries on customer schedule', '12 deliveries per year')

button.style: flex: 1; background: #F5F6F8; border: none; border-radius: 12px; font-weight: 700; height: 48px; color: #444; font-size: 15px; padding: 0;
flex: 2.5; background: var(--moyee-pink); border: none; border-radius: 12px; font-weight: 700; height: 48px; color: white; font-size: 15px; padding: 0;
border-radius: 12px; padding: 12px; font-size: 14px; background-color: var(--moyee-pink) !important; border: none; color: white !important;

button.onclick: return confirm('Are you sure you want to cancel your subscription?');

div.p: You can temporarily pause your subscription. You won't be charged during the pause and can resume at any time.

label.style: font-size: 11px; font-weight: 800; color: #555; letter-spacing: 0.5px; margin-bottom: 8px; display: block; text-transform: uppercase;

select.name: pause_until_date
select.style: border-radius: 12px; border: 1.5px solid #E2E8F0; padding: 12px 16px; font-size: 15px; font-weight: 700; height: 50px; color: #111; background-color: white;

button.style: flex: 1; background: #F5F6F8; border: none; border-radius: 12px; font-weight: 700; height: 48px; color: #444; font-size: 15px; padding: 0;
flex: 2.5; background: #555555; border: none; border-radius: 12px; font-weight: 700; height: 48px; color: white; font-size: 15px; padding: 0;

t.div: You are about to permanently close a subscription that is valid until .

div.h3: We are sorry to see you go.
div.p: Tell us, why are you leaving?

option.value: I have wayy to much coffee

t.option: I have wayy to much coffee

div.p: Update quantities or remove products from your active subscription.

div.class: d-flex align-items-center justify-content-between gap-3 p-2 rounded

div.style: width: 40px; height: 40px; background: #fff; border: 1px solid var(--moyee-gray-2);

input.name: qty
input.style: width: 55px; height: 32px; border-radius: 6px; padding: 2px; font-size: 13px; border: 1.5px solid var(--moyee-gray-2);

button.onclick: return confirm('Remove this product from your subscription?');

div.style: background: var(--moyee-gray-1); height: 100%; border: 1px solid var(--moyee-gray-2);

div.p: Select quantity and click "Add" to insert a coffee product into your subscription.

t.t-value: 'whole' in pname and 'whole' or 'filter' in pname and 'filter' or 'espresso' in pname and 'espresso' or ('capsule' in pname or 'cups' in pname) and 'capsules' or 'whole'
('1kg' in pname.replace(' ', '') or '1 kg' in pname) and '1kg' or '250' in pname and '250g' or '25' in pname and '25caps' or '1kg'

input.name: company_name
input.t-att-value: partner.parent_id.name if partner.parent_id else partner.company_name or ''

button.style: flex: 1; background: #F5F6F8; border: none; border-radius: 12px; font-weight: 700; height: 48px; color: #444; font-size: 15px; padding: 0;
flex: 2.5; background: var(--moyee-pink); border: none; border-radius: 12px; font-weight: 700; height: 48px; color: white; font-size: 15px; padding: 0;

t.t-value: clean_tmpl_name.replace(' 25 CAPSULES', '').replace(' 25 capsules', '').replace(' 25 Capsules', '').replace(' 25 CAPS', '').replace(' 25 caps', '')

button.style: background: var(--moyee-pink); border: none; border-radius: 8px; font-weight: 700; height: 44px; padding: 0; color: white;

span.style: background: #FFF0F5; color: #E91E63; border-radius: 30px; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase; font-size: 11px; padding: 4px 12px; display: inline-block; letter-spacing: 0.5px;
background: #F0EDFF; color: #6F42C1; border-radius: 30px; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase; font-size: 11px; padding: 4px 12px; display: inline-block; letter-spacing: 0.5px;
background: #EAF2FF; color: #007BFF; border-radius: 30px; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase; font-size: 11px; padding: 4px 12px; display: inline-block; letter-spacing: 0.5px;
background: #E2F6EA; color: #1E7E34; border-radius: 30px; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase; font-size: 11px; padding: 4px 12px; display: inline-block; letter-spacing: 0.5px;
background: #FFEBEB; color: #DC3545; border-radius: 30px; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase; font-size: 11px; padding: 4px 12px; display: inline-block; letter-spacing: 0.5px;
background: #FFF9E6; color: #D39E00; border-radius: 30px; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase; font-size: 11px; padding: 4px 12px; display: inline-block; letter-spacing: 0.5px;
background: #F2F2F2; color: #555555; border-radius: 30px; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase; font-size: 11px; padding: 4px 12px; display: inline-block; letter-spacing: 0.5px;

t.t-if: 'delivery' not in lname and not ('is_delivery' in line._fields and line.is_delivery)

t.t-value: so_active_lines.filtered(lambda l: ('is_delivery' in l._fields and l.is_delivery) or 'delivery' in (l.product_id and l.product_id.name or l.name or '').lower())
so_active_lines.filtered(lambda l: not l.display_type and not ('is_delivery' in l._fields and l.is_delivery) and 'delivery' not in (l.product_id and l.product_id.name or l.name or '').lower())

button.style: width: 100%; background: #F5F6F8; border: none; border-radius: 12px; font-weight: 700; height: 48px; color: #444; font-size: 15px; padding: 0;
flex: 1; background: #F5F6F8; border: none; border-radius: 12px; font-weight: 700; height: 48px; color: #444; font-size: 15px; padding: 0;
background: var(--moyee-pink); border: none; border-radius: 12px; font-weight: 700; height: 48px; color: white; font-size: 15px; padding: 0;
